## name: 📊 Performance Violation about: Report a performance requirements violation title: '[PERFORMANCE] ' labels: ['type/performance-violation', 'severity/p1'] assignees: ''

# 📊 **PERFORMANCE VIOLATION INCIDENT REPORT**

## **Incident Details**

- **Severity**: P0/P1/P2/P3
- **Component**: [Component Name]
- **Date**: [YYYY-MM-DD]
- **Reporter**: [Your Name]

## **Performance Violation Type**

- [ ] Exceeds performance threshold
- [ ] No performance requirements specified
- [ ] No performance testing implemented
- [ ] No performance monitoring implemented
- [ ] Performance degradation detected
- [ ] Performance blocking critical operations

## **Performance Requirements**

- **Requirement**: [REQ-PERF-XXX]
- **Threshold**: [X seconds]
- **Actual Performance**: [X seconds]
- **Performance Gap**: [X seconds or %]

## **Impact Assessment**

- **Affected Systems**: [List of affected systems]
- **User Impact**: [Description of user impact]
- **Business Impact**: [Description of business impact]
- **Performance Impact**: [Description of performance impact]

## **Root Cause Analysis**

- **Primary Cause**: [Root cause]
- **Contributing Factors**: [Contributing factors]
- **Performance Issues**: [List of performance issues]

## **Expected Resolution**

- **Solution Required**: [Description of required solution]
- **Performance Optimization**: [List of performance optimizations needed]
- **Testing Required**: [Description of required testing]
- **Validation Required**: [Description of required validation]

## **Additional Context**

- **Performance Metrics**: [Any performance metrics]
- **Logs**: [Any relevant logs]
- **Screenshots**: [Any relevant screenshots]
- **Steps to Reproduce**: [Steps to reproduce the performance issue]

## **Follow-up Actions**

- [ ] Update performance requirements
- [ ] Implement performance testing
- [ ] Implement performance monitoring
- [ ] Conduct performance optimization
- [ ] Update knowledge base
- [ ] Implement prevention measures
- [ ] Conduct post-incident review
